popularStory.headline: Samuel Mayo Biogfaphy
popularStory.description:
Biography
Captain Samuel Mayo was the eldest son of Rev. John Mayo and his wife Tamsin. He was born in England and came to New England with his mother and father and four other children in 1638, altho …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Mayo於1625年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Reverend John Mayo Jr.27歲，母親Thomasine Brike28歲。他於1643年與Thomasine Lumpkin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼亞爾姆斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1644年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波且於1655年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓被列為mariner。他去世於1664年4月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼亞爾姆斯享年39歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Mayo于1625年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Reverend John Mayo Jr.27岁，母亲Thomasine Brike28岁。他于1643年与Thomasine Lumpkin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼亞爾姆斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1644年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波且于1655年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓被列为mariner。他去世于1664年4月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼亞爾姆斯享年39岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Mayo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Mayhew
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the French and Middle English personal name Maheu (Old French Mahieu), a common Norman form of Matthew . Its common Middle English pet form was Maw, by syncope of the medial -he-; see under Maw 1. See also May and Mahy .

History: Thomas Mayhew (1593–1682) came to Medford, MA, from Tisbury, Wiltshire, England, c. 1632, and subsequently moved to Watertown, MA. In 1642 he established a settlement on Martha's Vineyard, with his son Thomas, who was the first English missionary to the Indians of New England.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Mayo was born in 1625, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reverend John Mayo Jr., was 27 and his mother, Thomasine Brike, was 28. He married Thomasine Lumpkin in 1643, in Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1644 and Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1655. His occupation is listed as mariner in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 26 April 1664, in Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 39, and was buried in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Mayo est né en 1625, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reverend John Mayo Jr., avait 27 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Brike, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Thomasine Lumpkin en 1643, à Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1644 et à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1655. Sa profession de son indiquée est mariner à Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 26 avril 1664, à Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Samuel Mayo 1625 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reverend John Mayo Jr. 27 und seine Mutter Thomasine Brike 28. Er hat 1643 in Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Thomasine Lumpkin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1644 hat er in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und 1655 in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. sein Beruf ist als mariner in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. April 1664 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Mayo è nato il nel 1625 nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Reverend John Mayo Jr., aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Thomasine Brike, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Thomasine Lumpkin nel 1643, nel Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1644 e nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1655. La sua occupazione è indicata come mariner nel Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 26 aprile 1664, nel Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Mayoが1625年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Reverend John Mayo Jr.は27歳，母Thomasine Brikeは28歳であった。1643年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーヤーモウスでThomasine Lumpkinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1644年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルに，1655年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムに住んでいた。イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストンでの職業はmarinerと記録されている。彼は1664年4月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーヤーモウスで39歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンにて埋葬された。

ko.Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 야모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Mayo(이)가 1625년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reverend John Mayo Jr.(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasine Brike(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1643년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 야모우스에서 Thomasine Lumpkin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1644년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서, 1655년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴에서 mariner이었다. 그는 1664년 4월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 야모우스에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Mayo nasceu em 1625, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reverend John Mayo Jr., tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Brike, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Thomasine Lumpkin em 1643, em Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1644 e em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1655. Sua profissão aparece como mariner em Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 26 de abril de 1664, em Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Mayo родился в 1625 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reverend John Mayo Jr. было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Brike, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasine Lumpkin в 1643 г. в местности ярмоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1644 году и в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1655 году.  Он работал по профессии mariner в местности бостон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 26 апреля 1664 г. в местности ярмоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Mayo nació en 1625, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reverend John Mayo Jr., tenía 27 años y su mamá, Thomasine Brike, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Thomasine Lumpkin en 1643, en Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1644 y en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1655. Su ocupación registrada era mariner en Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 26 de abril de 1664, en Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
